english: What is the main difference between the role of the President and the Prime Minister in India's government?
hindi: भारत की सरकार में राष्ट्रपति और प्रधानमंत्री के कार्य के बीच मुख्य अंतर क्या है?
tamil: இந்திய அரசாங்கத்தில் குடியரசுத் தலைவர் மற்றும் பிரதமரின் பங்குகளில் முக்கிய வேறுபாடு என்ன?
vietnamese: Phân biệt chức vụ Tổng thống và Thủ tướng trong hệ thống chính phủ Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: The President serves as the head of state, while the Prime Minister is the head of government, responsible for the administration of the country.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by confusing the roles of the President and Prime Minister, or by providing a factual error about the Indian government's structure.
